name: ChatGPT Images: Download (API)
summary: Find every generated image in a ChatGPT chat (via backend-api) and trigger browser downloads for each.
description: Download every generated image from a ChatGPT conversation by id, using the same backend JSON the web app fetches. Walks the conversation mapping for image_asset_pointer parts, resolves each via the backend file-download API, and triggers a browser anchor-click to save the file. No DOM scraping, no CDP.

chat_id.description: ChatGPT conversation id (the part after /c/ in the URL).

download.description: If true (default), trigger browser downloads. If false, only list the images.

steps.name: Open ChatGPT to inherit the authenticated session
Allow the SPA shell + cookies to settle

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const falsy=(v)=>{const t=cleanArg(v).toLowerCase();return t==='false'||t==='0'||t==='no'||t==='n';};const chatId=cleanArg(arg0);if(!chatId)throw new Error('chat_id is required');const shouldDownload=!falsy(arg1);const session=await fetch('/api/auth/session',{credentials:'include'}).then(r=>r.json()).catch(()=>({}));const token=session?.accessToken;if(!token)throw new Error('No accessToken in /api/auth/session — not logged in?');const headers={'Authorization':'Bearer '+token,'Accept':'application/json'};const conv=await fetch('/backend-api/conversation/'+encodeURIComponent(chatId),{headers}).then(r=>{if(!r.ok)throw new Error('conversation API '+r.status);return r.json();});const mapping=conv.mapping||{};const imageParts=[];for(const [id,node] of Object.entries(mapping)){const msg=node?.message;if(!msg)continue;const parts=msg.content?.parts||[];parts.forEach((p,i)=>{if(typeof p==='object'&&p&&p.content_type==='image_asset_pointer'&&p.asset_pointer){const fileId=String(p.asset_pointer).replace(/^sediment:\/\//,'').replace(/^file-service:\/\//,'');if(fileId)imageParts.push({msg_id:id,role:msg.author?.role||null,part_idx:i,file_id:fileId,width:p.width||null,height:p.height||null,size_bytes:p.size_bytes||null,create_time:msg.create_time||null});}});}const seen=new Set();const unique=imageParts.filter(p=>{if(seen.has(p.file_id))return false;seen.add(p.file_id);return true;});const results=[];for(const p of unique){try{const meta=await fetch('/backend-api/files/'+encodeURIComponent(p.file_id)+'/download',{headers}).then(r=>{if(!r.ok)throw new Error('download api '+r.status);return r.json();});const baseName=(meta.file_name||p.file_id).split('/').pop()||(p.file_id+'.png');const entry={file_id:p.file_id,file_name:baseName,full_name:meta.file_name||null,size_bytes:meta.file_size_bytes||p.size_bytes||null,width:p.width,height:p.height,mime_type:meta.mime_type||null,download_url_present:!!meta.download_url};if(shouldDownload&&meta.download_url){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=meta.download_url;a.download=baseName;a.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,400));a.remove();entry.download_status='triggered';}else{entry.download_status=shouldDownload?'no_url':'list_only';}results.push(entry);}catch(err){results.push({file_id:p.file_id,download_status:'failed',error:String(err&&err.message||err)});}}return{chat_id:chatId,title:conv.title||null,url:location.href,image_count:imageParts.length,unique_image_count:unique.length,images:results,download_mode:shouldDownload};

steps.name: Fetch the conversation JSON, walk for image_asset_pointer parts, trigger anchor-click downloads

help.summary: Find every generated image in a ChatGPT chat (via backend-api) and trigger browser downloads for each.

parameters.chat_id: ChatGPT conversation id (the part after /c/ in the URL).
parameters.download: If true (default), trigger browser downloads. If false, only list the images.

examples.description: Download every generated image from a chat.

returns: { chat_id, title, image_count, unique_image_count, images: [{file_id, file_name, size_bytes, width, height, mime_type, download_status}] }
notes: Images are looked up by content_type=image_asset_pointer in the conversation mapping. Asset pointers like 'sediment://file_xxx' are resolved to signed download URLs.
Files land in the browser default Downloads folder under their server-assigned filename.
Same auth path as chatgpt_export_chat / chatgpt_export_full_chat: page session token, no separate login.
To generate images first, run chatgpt_send with `tool=image_gen`, then call this workflow with the resulting chat_id.
